pi_items.source: Web search and DNS/SSL queries confirm all three domains exist with active DNS and SSL certificates
WebFetch confirmed the domain exists and hosts Google Admin Toolbox Dig at https://toolbox.googleapps.com/apps/dig/
WebFetch confirmed domain exists and hosts SSL checker at https://www.sslshopper.com/ssl-checker.html
WebSearch confirmed DigiCert has SSL checkers at https://www.digicert.com/help/ and https://ssltools.digicert.com/checker/
Live DNS query via nslookup google.com 8.8.8.8 on 2026-03-07
Live SSL certificate query via openssl s_client -connect google.com:443 on 2026-03-07
Live SSL certificate query shows notAfter=Apr 27 08:36:37 2026 GMT
Live DNS query via nslookup amazon.com 8.8.8.8 on 2026-03-07

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real, publicly accessible domains. Google.com is served by IP 142.251.111.139 with a Google Trust Services SSL certificate expiring on 2026-04-27. Amazon.com is served by IP 98.87.170.71 with a DigiCert Inc SSL certificate expiring on 2027-01-23. Microsoft.com is served by IP 13.107.246.40 with a Microsoft Corporation SSL certificate expiring on 2026-08-03. All three domains have valid, non-expired SSL certificates as of March 7, 2026. The required DNS and SSL checking tools (Google Admin Toolbox Dig at toolbox.googleapps.com, SSL Shopper at sslshopper.com, and DigiCert SSL Checker at digicert.com) are all real, publicly accessible services.
